summary: Ghost Match Fix, unique_opponents field, and Scheduler Diagnostics - All tests pass. Backend: 11/11 pytest tests pass (100%), 3/3 MongoDB direct tests pass (100%). Frontend: Admin panel loads correctly with Tournament section showing goal metrics, status indicator, and matches remaining.

minor.issue: unique_opponents != comparisons for many papers in q-bio.BM (63/73 mismatches). This is expected because unique_opponents tracks distinct opponents while comparisons counts total matches (can have repeat matches with same opponent before dedup was implemented).

critical_code_review_comments: Ghost match fix in update_rankings_for_match (line ~596) correctly creates ranking entries via insert_ranking_for_paper fallback when ranking doesn't exist
insert_ranking_for_paper (line ~1043) correctly initializes unique_opponents:0 for new rankings
Scheduler auto-restart logic in _compare_loop (line ~283) has proper while loop with try/except and exponential backoff
Stall detection in get_progress_estimate (line ~444) correctly uses unique_opponents field for O(1) detection
seed_data_creation: Test papers created and cleaned up during ghost match fix simulation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ghost match fix and unique_opponents field fully tested. Key findings: (1) update_rankings_for_match now auto-creates ranking entries if missing via insert_ranking_for_paper fallback - verified working, (2) unique_opponents field exists on 100% of rankings (2135 total), (3) unique_opponents != comparisons for many papers because comparisons counts total matches while unique_opponents counts distinct opponents (expected with historical repeat matches before dedup), (4) Scheduler diagnostics endpoint returns loop_alive, last_cycle_at, cycles_since_restart, last_cycle_unmet, last_cycle_results, (5) Progress endpoint returns pair_exhausted, exhausted_papers, unique_pairs_played, max_possible_pairs, all_pairs_exhausted, last_match_at, failed_matches_total, (6) Frontend Tournament section shows goal metrics (General CI ≤ 15%, Top-10 CI ≤ 10%, Top-10 cross-matches), status indicator (System paused/Running/Stalled/Converged), and matches remaining count.

test_cases: Returns token with 'adm_' prefix on correct password
Returns goal1, goal2, goal3 with met/label/done/total fields
Returns ghost_matches (should be 0 or low after fix)
Returns results with drifted/papers_checked per category
Created test paper without ranking entry
Called update_rankings_for_match with test paper as winner
Verified ranking was auto-created with wins=1, comparisons=1, unique_opponents=1
Shows goal metrics (General CI ≤ 15%, Top-10 CI ≤ 10%, Top-10 cross-matches)
Shows recent match history with winner/loser titles

scheduler_diagnostics_sample.note: System is PAUSED on preview, so scheduler loop is alive but not generating matches

progress_sample_q_bio_BM.note: unique_pairs_played > max_possible_pairs because some papers were removed from matchable set after matches were played
